title: Configuration Files with `-file` Must Be Included First

features.name: lint_off directive with -file option referencing previously parsed source
features.description: Code should include a verilator_config file with lint_off -rule directive using -file option to reference a source file that appears earlier in the file list

features.name: unused signal in module triggering UNUSEDSIGNAL warning
features.description: Code should include a module with an input signal that is declared but never used, triggering Verilator's UNUSEDSIGNAL warning
